# day level randomize order of events
```{r}
#randomize order of events


#REMEMBER TO BIND THRESHOLD TO DF
start_time <- format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S")



pass_obs_day_2022G1 <- unique(pass_filt_binded_2022G1_thresh$date)
pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1 <- list()

pbouter = txtProgressBar(min=0, max = length(pass_obs_day_2022G1), style = 3)

set.seed(184)

for(k in pass_obs_day_2022G1) { 
  runouter <- k
  setTxtProgressBar(pbouter, k) #update progress bar
  loop.run_outer <- paste("outer run", runouter) 
  loop.run_outer
  
  pass_filt_binded_2022G1_rand <- subset(pass_filt_binded_2022G1_thresh, date == k )  
  #remove extra columns that create spam in loop
  pass_filt_binded_2022G1_rand <- subset(pass_filt_binded_2022G1_rand, select = c(date, full_time, actor, subject, bin, behavior, obs_period, date_period, type, phase, actor_rank, subject_rank, q95 ))
  
  
  obs <- pass_filt_binded_2022G1_rand$date_period
  #separate data into a list with each df=a date so we can randomize within days
  #sort_by_date <- function(x, i, y) {y <- filter(x, date == i )
  #mutate(y, date_counter = i)}
  
  datelist <- list()
  dater <- unique(obs)
  datex <- c(1: length(unique(obs)))
  #boop <- filter(both_numbered_sorted, both_numbered_sorted$date == datex [2])
  
  #loop to create a separate dataframe for each bird that only contains interactions #pertaining to that bird.
  #Each dataframe is stored within a list to make the dataframes easy to work with
  #separate data into list of each obs session each day 
  for(i in datex) { 
    output <- filter(pass_filt_binded_2022G1_rand, pass_filt_binded_2022G1_rand$date_period == dater[i] )
    if (nrow(output) < 1) {output [ nrow(output) + 1 , ] <- NA
    } 
    datelist[[paste0("list", dater[i])]] <- output}
  
  
  
  
  #run ids should be 1 through however many times you want to run through the permutation
  runIDs <- seq(1,100)
  
  #create an empty masterframe to be filled with each run of the permutation
  masterframe_day_pass_2022G1.st_unst.df <- data.frame(runIDs = character(),
                                                 actor = character(),
                                                 subject = character(),
                                                 date = character(),
                                                 full_time = integer(),
                                                 bin = integer(),
                                                 behavior = character(),
                                                 type = character(),
                                                 phase = character(),
                                                 actor_2 = character(),
                                                 subject_2 = character(),
                                                 full_time_2 = integer(),
                                                 date2 = character(),
                                                 q95 = numeric(),
                                                 counter = character(),
                                                 initiated = character(),
                                                 rule_followed = character(),
                                                 stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
  nruns <- 100
  #pb = txtProgressBar(min=0, max = nruns, style = 3)
  
  #forloop starts here'
  for (r in 1:length(runIDs)) { #r = 1 is a test you can uncomment to see if it works before #running it 100 times
    #r = 1
    run <- r
    #setTxtProgressBar(pb, r) #update progress bar
    loop.run <- paste("inner run", run) 
    loop.run
    #for example, if r = 1, looprun will say run 1 which will allow you to keep each run's #data straight
    
    
    #loop.seed <- set.seed[r] didnt work so ignore. not needed
    
    
    #renamed data
    loop.datalist <- datelist
    xorder <- c()
    listlength <- as.numeric(length(loop.datalist))
    datex2 <- 1:listlength
    full_time_list <-c()
    loop.data.randomized.time.added <- c()
    #get rid of anything thats not actor and receiver (we will bind back on the date and time #later anyways to preserve
    #their order)
    
    #remove date from each df in the list
    #create a randomized sequence of numbers to bind to the subset data (ex. 2,6,1,3,5,4)
    #sort the data frame to put the randomized numbers in order from 1 to whatever and voila, #the order of events has been randomized (ex. from above 1,2,3,4,5,6)
    
    for(i in datex2) {
      full_time_list[[i]] <- subset(loop.datalist[[i]], select = c(full_time))
      loop.datalist[[i]] <- subset(loop.datalist[[i]], select = -c(full_time))
      
      xorder[[i]] <- data.frame(xorder = sample(1:length(loop.datalist[[i]]$actor),
                                                length(loop.datalist[[i]]$actor)))
      loop.datalist[[i]] <- mutate(loop.datalist[[i]], 
                                   xorderx = xorder[[i]]$xorder)
      loop.datalist[[i]] <-
        loop.datalist[[i]][order(loop.datalist[[i]]$xorderx),]
      #bind time back on
      loop.data.randomized.time.added[[i]] <- bind_cols(loop.datalist[[i]], full_time_list[[i]])
      loop.data.randomized.time.added[[i]] <- subset(loop.data.randomized.time.added[[i]], select = -c(xorderx))
      
    }
    
    practdrlist <- loop.data.randomized.time.added
    
    

#separate data into list of each obs session each day for each bird

actex <- c(1:length(actorer))
dater <- unique(obs)
practdrlist_split_by_bird <- c()

for(i in datex2) {
for (g in actex) {output <- subset(practdrlist[[i]], actor == actorer[g] |  subject == actorer[g])
#if one of the dfs in the list is empty, add NA
   if (nrow(output) < 1) {output [ nrow(output) + 1 , ] <- NA
    } 
  output <- mutate(output, counter = actorer[g])
  practdrlist_split_by_bird[[paste0("list", dater[i], actorer[g])]] <- output
}}
    
    
    pass_2022G1_rand_split_by_bird_ordered <- lapply(practdrlist_split_by_bird, function(x) arrange(x, date, full_time))
    
    
    
    
    #modified each data frame to put consecutive events side by side
    
    pass_rand_test_2022G1 <- lapply(pass_2022G1_rand_split_by_bird_ordered, function(x) mutate(x, actor_2 = lead(actor), 
                                                                                   actor_2_rank = lead(actor_rank), 
                                                                                   subject_2 = lead(subject), 
                                                                                   subject_2_rank = lead(subject_rank), 
                                                                                   full_time_2 = lead(full_time), 
                                                                                   date2 = lead(date))) 
    
    
    
    
    #successfully picked out pass rule while keeping all dataframes in a list (yay!!!)
    #loop to set conditionals to pick out pass
    
    #counter corresponds with which birds dataframe I am looking at and is used to control for false positives 
    #for example, if pass is detected for a bird whos specific dataframe I am not looking #at , this may be a false positive, as that birds interactions are not all listed in the #dataframe of another bird. In other words, the bird may have done something else to another #bird that is not listed, as it would be only listed in that specific birds dataframe
    dateact2 <-  c(1:length(pass_rand_test_2022G1))
    
    
    
     for(i in dateact2) {
      pass_rand_test_2022G1[[i]] <- mutate(pass_rand_test_2022G1[[i]], 
                                           initiated = ifelse(subject == counter, "yes","no"), 
                                         rule_followed = ifelse( subject == actor_2 
                                                                 & full_time_2 - full_time <= q95 
                                                                 & full_time_2 - full_time > 0
                                                                 & date2 == date
                                                                 & subject == counter
                                                                 & actor_2 == counter
                                                                 & actor_2_rank < subject_2_rank
                                                                 & actor != subject_2,
                                                                 "yes","no"), time_to_pass = full_time_2 - full_time)
    } 
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
    #combine dataframes into one huge dataframe
    testhuge <- bind_rows(pass_rand_test_2022G1, .id = "column_label")
    
    #sort by time and date
    testhugesorted <- testhuge %>%
      arrange(testhuge$date, testhuge$full_time)
    
    
    
    #need to check but i think it works to get rid of all "initiated no" rows to get rid of #duplicates, as pass 
    #is literally possible whenever an aggressive event takes place
    #Update. It does work
    
    testhugesorted_no_dup <- subset(testhugesorted, initiated != "no") 
    
    
    pass_no_dup_rand_2022G1 <- subset(testhugesorted_no_dup, select = c(date, full_time, actor, actor_rank, subject, subject_rank, bin, behavior, type, phase, counter, actor_2, actor_2_rank, subject_2, subject_2_rank,  full_time_2, date2, q95, initiated, rule_followed, time_to_pass))
    
    
    
    
    
    
    #end of pass process
    #end of rule code
    
    
    
    #bind vector of run IDs for each run to the dataframe so that you can have a numeric run #id next to each data point
    #that coresponds with that run which will allow you to sort/put them in ascending order later
    runIDs <- rep(loop.run, length(pass_no_dup_rand_2022G1$actor))
    
    pass_complete <- cbind(runIDs, pass_no_dup_rand_2022G1)
    
    
    #put each runs data into teh masterframe
    masterframe_day_pass_2022G1.st_unst.df <- rbind(masterframe_day_pass_2022G1.st_unst.df, pass_complete)
    
  }
  pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1[[paste0("day", k)]] <- masterframe_day_pass_2022G1.st_unst.df
}

pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded <-  bind_rows(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1, .id = "column_label")


end_time <- format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S")
start_time
end_time


#write.csv(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded,  here("ch3 data","pass_countmaster_day_level_stable_unstable_2022G1_custom_thresh.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}


#pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded <- read_csv(here("ch3 data",("pass_countmaster_day_level_stable_unstable_2022G1_custom_thresh.csv")))
pass_doner_all_yes_2022G1

head(pass_doner_all_yes_2022G1) 



pass_count_length_sum_2022G1 <- pass_doner_all_yes_2022G1 %>% group_by( date) %>%
  dplyr::summarize (
    count =n())

pass_count_length_sum_2022G1


pass_dates_2022G1 <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded$date)
```







#day1
```{r}
#day1

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[1]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded_day1 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day1_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded_day1$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded_day1$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded_day1$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day1 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day1_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day1

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day1 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day1_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day1 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day1/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day1

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day1 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day1_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm



#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day1 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded_day1$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.1 ,
  z_score = z_score_day1,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day1 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day1, new_row)

```

```{r}
                 binwidth=5,

  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day2_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +

  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day2

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day2 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day2_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day2 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day2/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day2

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts

sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score

#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later

                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day2_2022G1_binded_day2$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "less",
  p_cmls = 0.01 ,
  z_score = z_score_day2,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day2 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day2, new_row)
```

```{r}
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day6

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day6 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day6/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day6

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day6 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day6_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day6 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day6_2022G1_binded_day6$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.31 ,
  z_score = z_score_day6,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day6 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day6, new_row)

```

#day7
```{r}
#day7

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[7]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day7_2022G1_binded_day7 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day7_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day7_2022G1_binded_day7$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day7_2022G1_binded_day7$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day7_2022G1_binded_day7$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day7 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day7_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day7

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day7 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day7_real$count > rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day7 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day7/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day7

#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts

sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day7 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day7_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later

                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day7_2022G1_binded_day7$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
```

```{r}
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day12_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day12

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day12 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day12_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day12 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day12/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day12

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day12 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day12_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day12 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day12_2022G1_binded_day12$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "less",
  p_cmls = 0.01 ,
  z_score = z_score_day12,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day12 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day12, new_row)

```

```{r}
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day13_2022G1_binded_day13$runIDs == j))

  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +

  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025))
```

```{r}
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2022G1_binded_day18$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2022G1_binded_day18$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day18 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day18_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day18

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day18 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day18_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day18 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day18/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day18

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day18 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day18_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day18 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2022G1_binded_day18$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.6 ,
  z_score = z_score_day18,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day18 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day18, new_row)

```

```{r}
#day24

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[24]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2022G1_binded_day24 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day24_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2022G1_binded_day24$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2022G1_binded_day24$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2022G1_binded_day24$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day24 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day24_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day24

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day24 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day24_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day24 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day24/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day24

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day24 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day24_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day24 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2022G1_binded_day24$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.42 ,
  z_score = z_score_day24,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day24 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day24, new_row)

```

```{r}
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day29_2022G1_binded_day29$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.12 ,
  z_score = z_score_day29,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day29 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day29, new_row)

```

#day30
```{r}
#day30

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[30]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2022G1_binded_day30 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day30_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2022G1_binded_day30$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2022G1_binded_day30$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2022G1_binded_day30$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day30 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day30_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day30

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day30 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day30_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day30 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day30/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day30

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day30 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day30_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day30 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2022G1_binded_day30$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.12 ,
  z_score = z_score_day30,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day30 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day30, new_row)

```

```{r}
st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day35

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day35 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day35_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day35 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day35_2022G1_binded_day35$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.81 ,
  z_score = z_score_day35,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day35 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day35, new_row)

```

#day36
```{r}
#day36

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[36]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2022G1_binded_day36 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day36_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2022G1_binded_day36$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2022G1_binded_day36$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2022G1_binded_day36$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day36 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day36_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day36

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day36 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day36_real$count > rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day36 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day36/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day36

#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts

sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day36 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day36_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day36 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2022G1_binded_day36$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls =0.19 ,
```

```{r}
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day41_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day41

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day41 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day41_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day41 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day41/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day41

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day41 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day41_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day41 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day41_2022G1_binded_day41$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = 0.54,
  p_cmls = "same" ,
  z_score = z_score_day41,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day41 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day41, new_row)

```

#day42
```{r}
#day42

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[42]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day42_2022G1_binded_day42 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day42_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day42_2022G1_binded_day42$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day42_2022G1_binded_day42$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day42_2022G1_binded_day42$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day42 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day42_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day42

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day42 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day42_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day42 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day42/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
```

```{r}
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day47_2022G1_binded_day47$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day47_2022G1_binded_day47$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day47 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day47_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day47

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day47 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day47_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day47 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day47/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day47

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day47 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day47_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day47 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day47_2022G1_binded_day47$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "less",
  p_cmls = 0.02 ,
  z_score = z_score_day47,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day47 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day47, new_row)

```

```{r}
current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[53]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day53_2022G1_binded_day53 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day53_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day53_2022G1_binded_day53$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day53_2022G1_binded_day53$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day53_2022G1_binded_day53$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day53 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day53_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day53

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day53 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day53_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day53 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day53/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day53

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day53 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day53_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day53 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day53_2022G1_binded_day53$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "less",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day53,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day53 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day53, new_row)

```

```{r}
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day58_2022G1_binded_day58$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.28 ,
  z_score = z_score_day58,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day58 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day58, new_row)

```

#day59
```{r}
#day59

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[59]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day59_2022G1_binded_day59 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day59_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day59_2022G1_binded_day59$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day59_2022G1_binded_day59$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day59_2022G1_binded_day59$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day59 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day59_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day59

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day59 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day59_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day59 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day59/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day59

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day59 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day59_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day59 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day59_2022G1_binded_day59$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.07 ,
  z_score = z_score_day59,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day59 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day59, new_row)

```

```{r}
st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day64

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day64 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day64_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day64 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day64_2022G1_binded_day64$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.46 ,
  z_score = z_score_day64,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day64 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day64, new_row)

```

#day65
```{r}
#day65

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[65]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day65_2022G1_binded_day65 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day65_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day65_2022G1_binded_day65$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day65_2022G1_binded_day65$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day65_2022G1_binded_day65$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day65 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day65_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day65

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day65 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day65_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day65 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day65/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day65

#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts

sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day65 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day65_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later

                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day65_2022G1_binded_day65$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.74 ,

)
#bind row of data to df
```

```{r}
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day70_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day70

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day70 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day70_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day70 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day70/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day70

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day70 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day70_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day70 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day70_2022G1_binded_day70$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "less",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day70,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day70 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day70, new_row)

```

#day71
```{r}
#day71

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[71]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day71_2022G1_binded_day71 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day71_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day71_2022G1_binded_day71$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day71_2022G1_binded_day71$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day71_2022G1_binded_day71$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day71 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day71_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day71

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day71 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day71_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day71 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day71/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

  group = 2,
```

```{r}
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day76_2022G1_binded_day76$rule_followed == "yes" &
```

```{r}
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day76 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day76_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day76

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day76 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day76_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day76 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day76/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day76

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day76 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day76_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day76 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day76_2022G1_binded_day76$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.17 ,
  z_score = z_score_day76,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day76 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day76, new_row)

```

```{r}
current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[82]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day82_2022G1_binded_day82 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day82_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day82_2022G1_binded_day82$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day82_2022G1_binded_day82$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day82_2022G1_binded_day82$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day82 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day82_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day82

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day82 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day82_real$count > rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day82 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day82/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day82

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day82 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day82_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day82 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day82_2022G1_binded_day82$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.32 ,
  z_score = z_score_day82,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day82 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day82, new_row)

```

#day83
```{r}
#day83

current_date <- pass_dates_2022G1[83]
current_date



pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day83_2022G1_binded_day83 <- subset(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2022G1_binded, date == current_date)

pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day83_real <- subset(pass_count_length_sum_2022G1, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day83_2022G1_binded_day83$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_passs <- length(which(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day83_2022G1_binded_day83$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day83_2022G1_binded_day83$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 <- c(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1, len_of_passs)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1 <- data.frame(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pass_real <- length(which(pass_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pass_real.frame <- data.frame(pass_real))"
st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day83 <- ggplot(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1, aes(x=random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day83_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pass events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

st_unst_pass_2022G1_count_plot_day83

st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day83 <-length(which(pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day83_real$count < rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1 ))



st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day83 <-   1 - st_unst_pass_tally2022G1_day83/length(rand_pass_.frame_st_unst_2022G1$random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

st_unst_ppass_tally2022G1_day83

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pass_followed_st_unst_2022G1)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day83 <- (pass_count_length_list_2022G1_day83_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
st_unst_df_piece_day83 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pass_count_length_list_masterframe_day83_2022G1_binded_day83$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 2,
  bin = bin_for_store, date = current_date,
  rule = "pass",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.06 ,
  z_score = z_score_day83,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
st_unst_df_piece_day83 <- rbind(st_unst_df_piece_day83, new_row)
```

```{r}
  st_unst_df_piece_day1,  st_unst_df_piece_day2,  st_unst_df_piece_day3,  st_unst_df_piece_day4,  st_unst_df_piece_day5,
```
